conservative.name: Path of the Autumn Wind
conservative.requirements: Sword or Greatsword equipped, engaged with target

success.description: You hit for normal damage. Each time a recharge token is removed from this card, you may remove 1 recharge token from 1 of your Active Defences

boon.description: You may remove a recharge token from this card after resolving this action

sigmarsComet.description: You may add 2 recharge tokens to any of your Way of the Sword cards currently recharging (including this one)
